backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features in About.tsx: adding a stall/owner photo with luxury styling, and applying a 3D embossed text-shadow to the 'Our Story' heading.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing each file's role and styling choices in the Coffee Craft app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Playfair Display and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navbar, Hero, About, Location, Contact, Footer, and FloatingSocialIcons on a warm cream background.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About/Our Story section featuring a luxury 3D embossed heading with a decorative gold rule, a framed stall/owner photo with warm gradient border, and the brand's founding story copy.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with Instagram and WhatsApp links styled with brown/gold glow icon buttons and the brand's social handles.
frontend/src/components/FloatingSocialIc: Fixed floating action cluster rendering circular WhatsApp and Instagram buttons at the bottom-right corner with brown/gold glow hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Minimal dark footer displaying the copyright year, a gold-tinted brand name with subtle 3D text-shadow, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a coffee background image, overlays, animated 3D-styled headline ('COFFEE CRAFT'), tagline, and a scroll-down button.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Location section displaying the café's address in West Bengal, India, along with hours and dine-in/takeaway info, styled with warm brown decorative elements.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, logo, brand name, desktop nav links with hover underlines, and a mobile hamburger menu with smooth-scroll behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and status tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, OKLCH CSS custom properties for a warm cream luxury palette, and reusable glow/animation utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Coffee Craft frontend, defining a luxury brown/cream color palette, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), glow box-shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 7) describing the Coffee Craft single-page luxury website's architecture, brand details, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for build planning.
